label: Korean War Total Casualties
source: US Dept of Defense, ROK Defense Ministry
contestNote: Figures include military + civilian dead on all sides; North Korean/Chinese civilian deaths are heavily contested estimates
deltaNote: KPA: ~215K military; ROK: ~138K military; US: 36,574; China: 180-400K; civilian: 2M+

label: Years Since Korea's Division
source: Korea's partition at 38th parallel established August 15, 1945
deltaNote: Division made permanent by founding of separate states in 1948; no peace treaty signed as of 2026

label: ROK GDP Per Capita (2025)
deltaNote: Rose from $82 in 1961 to over $36,000 by 2025 — one of history's fastest economic transformations

label: DPRK Nuclear Tests Conducted
deltaNote: Tests: Oct 2006, May 2009, Feb 2013, Jan 2016, Sep 2016 (2), Sep 2017. Last test was a claimed thermonuclear device.

label: K-pop Global Revenue (2023)
deltaNote: Includes music, concert tours, merchandise, licensing, and related content industries

label: ROK Active Military Personnel
deltaNote: Plus 28,500 US Forces Korea (USFK) and 3.1M reservists; mandatory military service for men (18-21 months)

label: Years of Korean Civilization
source: Korean National Foundation Day tradition (2333 BCE founding of Gojoseon)
contestNote: 2333 BCE founding date is legendary; archaeological evidence supports proto-state from ~4th century BCE

label: UN SC Resolutions on DPRK
deltaNote: Increasingly severe sanctions since 2006 nuclear tests; resolutions include UNSCR 1718, 1874, 2087, 2094, 2270, 2375, 2397
